title: The World Government Erases a Kingdom
description: On pages 5–7, this part focuses on Unknown person #4, Luffy, Wano Citizens, Buggy, Unknown person #5, Sabo as Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.
scene: Luffy reveals his true dream to the crew while world events around Sabo, Lulusia, and the Government signal a dangerous new stage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If the opportunity presents itself, we can pitch in then... but in the meantime, have faith and quit bellyaching!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Hmph!! You can't stop us from worrying!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: You're an ON!!! No, an ONI- GASHIMA!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There were a lot of developments...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: And things seem to be escalating fast!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...drive those elite pirates back to the seas.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: and buggy the Bombastic clown became an emperor!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: There has to be some mixup!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: luffy... there are other familiar names in here... would you like to hear...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nah, I'll leave it up to you!! Just tell me if there's anything big to keep an eye on.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I wouldn't want to over- load you with information.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...he had a real strict upbringing. He just wants to make sure no one else has their freedoms taken, the way he did!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I want to see the world and write a book about it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Shishish!!! Okay, my turn!! I'm gonna...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: the three of us swore an oath! Me, him, and ace!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Wahaha!! That sounds great!! It's perfect!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Didn't get I think someone needs to check his head!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: C'mon, there's no way anyone can do that!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But I'll have a shot if I become King of the Pirates!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I don't even know how you come up with this stuff!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I've never mentioned this to any of you before?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Nope! But it wouldn't have made much of a difference...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: That means I only told shanks,

dialogue.speaker: Yamato
dialogue.text: "Ace, Shdo... and I guess that's it!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They all laughed! Oh, and shanks had some tears rolling down his face!

summary: This part advances the New Era After Wano through 52 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on character decisions, battlefield momentum, and the story’s larger consequences.
